title: Giardiasis - NHS
text:
utlery and utensils
do not use a swimming pool until 2 weeks after your symptoms stop
Important
You're most infectious from when your symptoms start until 2 days after they have passed. Stay off school or work until your symptoms have stopped for 2 days.
How to look after yourself if you have giardiasis 
To look after yourself while you have giardiasis:
drink lots of fluids to avoid dehydration, such as water and squash – if you're well hydrated, your pee should be light yellow or clear do not drink alcohol while you're taking antibiotics – alcohol can react with the main antibiotics used to treat giardiasis If your baby has giardiasis, give them breast or bottle feeds as usual.
A pharmacist can help if you're dehydrated Speak to a pharmacist if you have signs of dehydration , such as peeing less than usual or having dark, strong-smelling pee.
They may recommend using sachets that you mix with water to help you stay hydrated, called oral rehydration solutions.
